items.title: Saenal, S. Pt - LinkedIn Indonesia
items.snippet: Fresh Graduate of Animal Science Hasanuddin University | Ruminant and Poultry Livestock Management · A Bachelor degree of Animal Science Hasanuddin University who is proficient in livestock management, animal reproduction, animal nutrition, animal behavior and welfare. Have a keen interest in the Animal world, like Ruminants and poultry. Has experience as a cattle farm supervisor and Farmers ...
